title: A Wink From Hesper
content:
A wink from Hesper, falling
    Fast in the wintry sky,
    Comes through the even blue,
    Dear, like a word from you . . .
    Is it good-bye?

    Across the miles between us
    I send you sigh for sigh.
    Good-night, sweet friend, good-night:
    Till life and all take flight,
    Never good-bye.
meaning:
"A Wink From Hesper" is a quintessential example of William Ernest Henley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
